name: Viriva Community Credit Union
description_short: Viriva Community Credit Union merged with American Heritage Credit Union effective November 1, 2021. Members now access banking services through American Heritage's 35+ branch network.
description_long: Viriva Community Credit Union was an independent credit union that completed a merger with American Heritage Credit Union on November 1, 2021. This integration consolidated Viriva's membership into American Heritage's larger financial institution, combining over 70 years of American Heritage's service history with Viriva's former member base. The merger represents a consolidation strategy that expanded American Heritage's geographic reach and member base. Following the merger, former Viriva members transitioned to American Heritage's systems, products, and branch network while maintaining continuity of their existing accounts and services. American Heritage operates 35+ branch locations, including the former Warminster Viriva branch that reopened under American Heritage branding. Members received new debit and credit cards, checks, routing numbers (236082944), and online banking credentials to access the merged institution's platform. The transition included comprehensive support through merger instruction manuals, FAQ resources, and dedicated transition assistance. American Heritage offers comprehensive banking products including checking and savings accounts, personal and business loans, credit cards, and various financial planning services. The institution emphasizes member security with warnings about phishing scams and provides multiple access channels including Online Teller, Mobile Teller, and Video Advisor (VANA) services for account management. American Heritage distinguishes itself through community involvement programs, partnership with First Heritage Realty Alliance for real estate services, brand partnerships offering member discounts on entertainment and home security, and comprehensive life-event financial planning resources. The merger consolidation provides scale and expanded resources but represents a loss of Viriva's independent community credit union status. Current Viriva members should note this is a legacy entity page documenting a completed merger rather than an active standalone institution.
pros: 35+ branch locations accessible to members, expanded from Viriva's previous network
New routing number 236082944 with established banking infrastructure
Multiple digital access channels: Online Teller, Mobile Teller, and Video Advisor (VANA) for account management
Free bill payment system that carried over payees and scheduled payments from Viriva accounts
Member discounts and savings through brand partnerships on entertainment, sports tickets, and home security
Community involvement programs and charitable partnerships
First Heritage Realty Alliance partnership for integrated real estate and financial services
Comprehensive merger support including instruction manuals and FAQ resources for smooth transition
cons: Viriva is no longer an independent credit union—members must use American Heritage systems post-merger
Transition required new card activation, check reordering, and account credential updates during November 2021 merger period
Website content indicates the institution experiences heavy call volume, suggesting potential customer service delays
Legacy company status means this entity no longer operates independently as Viriva Community Credit Union
Members had to update direct deposit information with new routing and account numbers
best_for: Former Viriva Community Credit Union members transitioning to American Heritage Banking
Consumers seeking traditional credit union banking with branch network access in American Heritage service areas
Members interested in community-focused financial institutions with charitable involvement
Customers wanting integrated real estate and banking services through First Heritage Realty Alliance
diagnosis: Viriva Community Credit Union members should use this resource to understand their November 2021 merger into American Heritage Credit Union and access transition guidance. This is a legacy informational page, not an active company profile—Viriva no longer operates independently and all services are now provided through American Heritage Credit Union's platform and infrastructure.
services: Home buying financial planning and guidance
Auto loan and car buying assistance
